A Polaroid-style photograph in front of a white curtain. One person in a gray hoodie points directly at the other in a white T-shirt with a playful grin, while the second person laughs openly, both lit by soft flash.

A Polaroid-style photograph of two people in front of a white curtain. One stands slightly behind, resting one hand gently on the other’s head, while the person in front looks into the camera playfully, raising their hand to make a peace sign with two fingers.

Transform the uploaded photo by placing the person in a realistic glass toy vending machine.

Keep your face, facial features, skin texture, body proportions, hair, and facial expression EXACTLY the same as in the original photo.
Do not decorate, do not smooth the skin, do not change the shape of the body, the structure of the face or emotions.

Posing:
A natural relaxed pose inside the simulator, lying among the toys.
One leg is slightly bent, the other is relaxed.
A man gently hugs a teddy bear.
The arms are positioned naturally, the anatomy is realistic, and the body is fully visible.

Clothing and appearance:
A white plush fur coat with a soft, dense texture, elegant and minimalistic (luxurious winter style).
The hairstyle remains the same as in the original photo., 
The makeup remained very natural and unchanged: clear skin, light blush, soft eyes, natural lips.
The facial expression is completely preserved.

Claw clipper and environment:
The claw clipper is made of transparent glass with barely noticeable reflections and glare of light.
Realistic metal arcade frame.
A joystick and buttons are visible at the bottom.
Front view, slightly wide angle.

Toys inside the car:
The car is filled only with realistic teddy bears.
Teddy bears in beige, cream and light brown tones, of different sizes.
Fluffy texture, soft fabric that fits snugly to the body, naturally touching the arms and legs.
No cartoon style, no plastic.

Lighting and style:
 Soft cinematic light pours from above.

Do not turn a person into a doll or a toy.
Don't distort the anatomy.

Use my selfie as the exact face reference.
Preserve my natural facial features, bone structure, proportions, skin texture, hairline, and expression without beautification or reshaping.

Ultra-realistic cinematic studio portrait in strict profile.
Three people arranged front-to-back in a single line.
Order: father in the foreground, mother behind him, child (or children) in the background.
All look in the same direction with calm neutral expressions.
All three wear simple black t-shirts with a clean minimal neckline.
Black seamless studio background.
Telephoto compression (135mm f/2.0) with shallow depth of field.

High-end cinematic beauty light with stronger directional contrast and deeper sculptural shadows, crisp glossy highlights and visible falloff.
Skin detail visible (pores, microtexture, fine hair).
Crisp high-resolution rendering, subtle cinematic color grading with enhanced shadow depth.

Ultra-realistic macro studio portrait of a child and an adult, cheek-to-cheek.
Only half of each face in frame, both look directly into the camera with soft smiles.
The child’s face is noticeably smaller than the adult’s, preserving correct age proportions and scale differences.
Professional optics: 100mm macro f/2.8, shallow depth of field, high micro-detail.
Bright frontal beauty light, crisp highlights, controlled shadows, skin texture visible.
Clean neutral studio background.

Using my photo, create a hyper-realistic scene where the person (keep facial features exactly as in the photo, identity must not change) is lying flat on the surface of a frozen lake in a tight top-down composition, as if the camera is positioned directly above, looking straight down. The person’s face is close to the camera, centered in frame, eyes open and calm, with small ice crystals and snow dust resting on eyebrows, eyelashes, cheeks, and hairline.
Next to the person, pressed shoulder-to-shoulder, lies a realistic Grinch character with detailed green fur and expressive mask face, oriented upside-down relative to the person so the two faces align symmetrically in the frame, creating a playful overhead selfie composition.
The ice beneath is blue-grey and translucent, filled with trapped air bubbles, frozen cracks, and frosty textures, rendered with extreme realism. Clothing is a vivid lime-green fuzzy coat with a wide plush collar and a soft knit layer underneath, fibers clearly visible and catching cold daylight. The Grinch’s fur blends naturally into the winter palette with scattered snow particles.
Lighting is natural overcast winter daylight, soft and diffused, with subtle specular highlights on ice and realistic skin texture.
Add a lot of snow inside the room around the girl, do not change the image

Use the uploaded photo exactly as it is — keep the person’s original face, expression, pose, clothing, proportions, and full framing unchanged. Do not alter the background, location, angle, or lighting of the original image. Your task is only to seamlessly place the person inside a large transparent ice cube, similar to a frozen block of ice standing around them. The cube must appear realistically integrated into the existing scene, matching the original perspective, shadows, and lighting. Add believable ice textures: frosted edges, internal cracks, subtle refractions, trapped air bubbles, and cold mist on the cube’s surface. The cube should surround the person fully, as if they are frozen inside it, without distorting or modifying their body. No changes to the environment — only add the realistic ice cube around the person and blend it naturally into the scene. Additionally, enhance the realism of the ice by adding scattered broken ice fragments and small chunks around the base of the cube, along with a light layer of snow dust settled on and around the bottom edges. These elements must be subtle, natural, and fully consistent with the lighting and shadows of the original scene, without altering or covering any part of the existing environment.

Enhance the uploaded photo by keeping the person, pose, clothing, proportions, and facial features exactly as they appear in the original. Preserve the original lighting direction and color profile. Introduce a dense atmospheric layer that naturally fills the scene and interacts with the environment, creating depth and soft diffusion around edges, foreground elements, and distant areas. The effect should slightly soften contrast, reduce visibility in the background, and create a sense of heavy, low-hanging moisture in the air. Ensure the atmosphere wraps around the subject realistically without obscuring the face. Maintain sharpness on the person while the surroundings fade gradually into a thick, visually rich haze that feels immersive and organic.@img1 @img2

Transform the uploaded person into a hanging Christmas tree ornament in a hyper-detailed, glossy, hand-painted style. Preserve the person’s recognizable facial features, hairstyle, beard or hair if present, and the exact style and silhouette of their outfit from the original photo, but reinterpret all elements as a premium glass figurine. The ornament must hang visibly on a Christmas tree branch, attached by a small golden metal cap and a thin string at the top of the head. The body proportions are toy-like and stylized, with smooth rounded shapes, polished lacquered surfaces, and reflective enamel textures. Clothes become glossy, hand-painted glass with simplified but accurate folds and accessories. Skin becomes smooth porcelain-like paint while keeping likeness. The figurine must precisely replicate the pose, gesture, stance, posture, head angle, hand positioning, body orientation, and overall attitude from the uploaded photo — matching the original composition and physical expression as closely as possible, but reinterpreted in a stylized ornament form. The figure is suspended among pine branches, surrounded by warm golden Christmas lights, soft bokeh, and festive glow. Lighting is warm, cozy, and cinematic, enhancing reflections on the glass surface. The entire composition must look like a premium handcrafted hanging ornament inspired by the uploaded photo, without realistic human texture — only stylized glossy enamel and holiday craftsmanship. Keep the pose, gesture, clothing, and facial expression accurately based on the uploaded photo.

Use the uploaded image as a primary reference and create a handmade thread art piece, a diorama made of yarn and felt. The scene must faithfully replicate the pose, posture, body positioning, facial orientation, gestures, framing, and camera angle of the original photo, keeping the composition instantly recognizable. Apply the transformation to the entire image without exception — every element of the original photo must be reinterpreted as handcrafted yarn, felt, wool, thread, and textile material. All characters, clothing, background elements, landscape, objects, props, environment, sky, ground, lighting cues, and textures should be fully converted into a cohesive yarn-and-felt miniature world. Macro photography, soft diffused light, pastel palette, high-detailed fibers and stitches, a cozy, fairytale atmosphere, and a slightly reduced scale, like a diorama. Everything in the scene should appear as intricately crafted textile art with visible fibers, soft edges, felted surfaces, and meticulously placed handmade details.

Transform the uploaded image into an extreme winter scene. Apply a full cinematic winter transformation to every element in the photo: people, clothing, hair, objects, environment, background, and atmosphere. Add dense falling snow of varying sizes, drifting naturally across the frame. Cover all visible surfaces with thick layers of snow, frost, and ice — including clothing, hair, skin, accessories, structures, grounds, and distant elements. Add icy textures, frozen edges, crystallized frost patterns, and visible snow buildup accumulating on horizontal areas. Introduce a cold winter light with a pale, bluish tone and diffused brightness, creating a crisp frozen ambience. Enhance depth and realism with frosty air, soft haze, and subtle bokeh flakes. The final result must look as if the entire scene — every part of the photo — has been exposed to heavy snowfall and deep freezing temperatures, turning the whole image into a complete, immersive winter world.

tight portrait shot of a woman standing outdoors in a snowy forest setting. The camera is positioned close, framed from the chest up, capturing her face, the upper volume of her coat, and the raised position of her arms. She looks directly into the camera with a calm expression. Her pose is identical to the reference: both hands are lifted toward the sides of her head as she adjusts her fur hat, causing her elbows to angle outward. This position highlights the width and softness of the oversized sleeves.She wears a white long-pile fur coat made of the same material as the hat. The coat is extremely voluminous, with soft rounded shoulders and very wide, fluffy sleeves. The fur texture is long, airy, and plush, with a bright white color and a slightly cool undertone. The coat has no visible structure or seams — only a full, cloud-like silhouette created by dense, soft fur.The hat is a thick white long-pile fur hat matching the coat perfectly in texture and color. It forms a plush cylindrical shape with a soft halo of long fibers around the edge. It sits low on her forehead, framing her face cleanly and creating a unified winter look with the coat.She wears dark rectangular sunglasses with a glossy frame, positioned firmly on her face and clearly visible in the framing. Her hair flows from underneath the hat in soft waves, resting over the fur.The background shows a snowy forest with tall evergreen trees covered in frost. The light is soft and diffused, typical of an overcast winter day, casting even illumination across her face and the textured fur. The portrait composition is clean and centered, with the model close to the lens so the details of the fur, sunglasses, and hat are sharply defined.

Using my photo, create a hyper-realistic cinematic scene in Vecna’s world from Stranger Things, preserving the real appearance, gender, face, and identity from the uploaded selfie. No stylization or illustration — only full realism, as if the moment were filmed with a professional cinema camera.
Fix the pose, camera angle, and clothing exactly as in the reference image I provided:
– Pose: the person stands in a tense, alert, slightly crouched stance with raised shoulders, torso leaning subtly forward and to the side. One arm is bent and lifted in a reactive gesture, while the other hand firmly holds a flashlight, casting a focused beam of light forward. Fingers grip the flashlight naturally, with tension matching the scene.
– Camera angle & framing: a slightly low-angle shot with an upward tilt, medium close-up framing from mid-torso to the top of the head. The person now looks directly into the camera, creating intense eye contact and adding dramatic tension.
– Clothing: a worn blue denim jacket with visible texture and creases, layered over a beige knitted sweater. The fit, folds, stitching, colors, and textures must remain identical to the reference.
The person is captured in a dynamic moment — subtle body movement, reactive posture, natural facial tension, and a focused gaze straight at the viewer. Light interacts with the skin realistically, emphasizing fine texture, pores, micro-shadows, and genuine emotion.
The final image must feel like a true scene from the Upside Down: grounded, atmospheric, dramatic, alive — a fully realistic cinematic frame that blends the subject seamlessly into Vecna’s world.

data.title: Custom Museum Artwork
data.description: Become part of a museum masterpiece

templates.promptTemplate: A cinematic, hyperrealistic scene inside a contemporary art gallery with bright white walls and soft, natural light falling from above. A large framed oil painting hangs on the wall — a realistic, expressive portrait of the same girl from the reference photo, showing her face and upper body in gentle brushstrokes and neutral tones. The painting is enclosed in a detailed golden frame with classical ornamentation. The girl herself stands before the painting with her back to the camera, perfectly mirroring the composition. Her light-colored floor-length dress flows softly behind her, catching faint reflections from the polished wooden floor. Her hair maintains the same length, color, and texture as in the reference, falling naturally over her shoulders. The scene feels quiet, elegant, and intimate — capturing the exact moment of contemplation as the viewer and her painted self exist together in one timeless frame.

A cinematic, hyperrealistic scene set in a minimalist modern art gallery with pristine white walls and polished wooden floors. On the wall hangs a large, classically framed oil painting depicting a single man shown from the chest up, rendered in a realistic yet expressive oil style with visible textured brushstrokes and a muted, refined palette. Focused gallery lighting softly highlights the artwork, creating gentle contrasts between light and shadow. In the foreground, the same man from the painting stands in full height, positioned centrally with his back to the camera and his face directed toward the painting. His arms hang naturally at his sides, his stance calm and grounded, mirroring the stillness of the environment. The composition is perfectly symmetrical, evoking a cinematic sense of reflection and identity — the real and the painted figure existing in quiet dialogue within the serene, contemplative atmosphere of the gallery.

A cinematic, hyperrealistic scene set in a minimalist modern art gallery with pristine white walls and polished wooden floors. On the wall hangs a large, classically framed oil painting depicting a man and a woman standing close together, their bodies slightly turned toward each other, captured in an expressive and realistic oil style with textured brushstrokes and a soft, muted color palette. Focused gallery lighting illuminates the artwork, highlighting the depth of the brushwork and the emotional connection between the painted figures. In the foreground, the same man and woman from the painting stand in full height, positioned symmetrically with their backs to the camera and faces directed toward the painting. They stand close to one another, mirroring the pose on the canvas — their posture calm and natural, their arms relaxed at their sides. The composition creates a perfect reflection between the real and the painted pairs, evoking a cinematic, contemplative tension as if the boundaries between art and reality quietly dissolve within the serene atmosphere of the gallery.

data.title: Happy Birthday
data.description: The day all eyes are on you

templates.promptTemplate: A cinematic birthday-themed photoshoot set against a dark, elegant background. A woman is captured standing exactly as in the reference, holding a bouquet of deep red roses at waist level with both hands, her body facing slightly toward camera-left while her gaze remains forward. She wears a black lace evening gown that closely follows her silhouette, matching the dramatic and sophisticated composition. To her side on the floor, positioned in front of her legs just like in the reference, the golden two-tier cake with lit candles glows softly under the warm studio light. Black and silver balloons float behind her on the left side of the frame, balancing the composition. A black cat sits on the floor near her feet on the right, adding a subtle mysterious accent. The scene is illuminated with warm, directional lighting that enhances the textured contrast of lace, gold, roses, and glossy reflections. Shot in RAW on Hasselblad 50mm, high-contrast and fashion-editorial atmosphere.

A stylish studio scene on a minimalist white background with a dramatic circular spotlight. A woman stands holding a chocolate birthday cake decorated with elegant golden candles, without numbers — a timeless celebratory detail. She is wearing a fashionable tailored blazer with clean sculptural lines, adding a bold editorial edge to her look. The light is strong and clean, producing deep shadows and a sharp outline of her silhouette against the background. The aesthetic feels luxurious yet simple — a perfect blend of high-fashion attitude and modern celebration. Shot on Hasselblad 50mm, cinematic light, glossy surface reflections.

A playful, high-fashion birthday setup in a vivid pink studio filled with red balloons. A woman is captured kneeling in the exact same pose as in the reference, with her legs folded neatly beneath her and her upper body turned slightly to the side. She wears a striking red dress crafted from layered rose petals, closely hugging her silhouette and cascading onto the floor. She holds a pink cake with a silver crown resting on top, positioned gracefully in front of her chest, exactly as in the reference posture. The glossy floor reflects the vibrant tones, while soft, even lighting enhances the smooth textures of the balloons, the floral dress, and the icing on the cake. The mood is celebratory, modern, and full of personality. Shot on Hasselblad 50mm, RAW color tone, pop-feminine aesthetic.

A cinematic portrait in a minimalist white studio, focused on soft pastel tones. A woman is captured sitting in the exact same elegant crouched pose as in the reference, with one knee slightly raised and her body turned gently to the side, maintaining a refined posture. She wears a pale pink flowing gown and holds a large bouquet of pink and lavender roses close to her chest, with the flowers resting naturally against her arms and not cascading to the floor. She has delicate high-heeled sandals in a soft nude-pink tone that perfectly complement her outfit. The light is soft, diffused, and volumetric, emphasizing the pastel color harmony, the smooth fabric flow, and glossy skin reflections. The scene conveys gentle sophistication and timeless femininity. Shot in RAW on Hasselblad 50mm, cinematic daylight, high-resolution realism.

A regal interior scene in a golden-lit classical room. The woman sits gracefully beside a decorated birthday cake on a round marble table. She wears a champagne-colored satin gown and gloves that reflect warm ambient light from wall lamps and chandeliers. The mirror behind her adds depth, amplifying the room’s ornate details — carved frames, velvet upholstery, and golden tones. The atmosphere is cinematic, elegant, and richly textured. Shot on Hasselblad 50mm, warm indoor lighting, fashion editorial realism.

A luxurious photoshoot inside a grand classical hall with high arched windows and soft daylight streaming in. A woman stands beside a white piano, wearing a satin white gown adorned with pearl chains and gloves. The golden interior tones, plush curtains, and reflective surfaces create a royal ambiance. The lighting softly wraps around her figure, enhancing the texture of pearls and satin. Shot on Hasselblad 50mm, warm cinematic lighting, editorial luxury tone.

A cinematic birthday portrait in a soft beige studio with warm ambient light. A woman poses elegantly beside a golden cake with candles, surrounded by roses and minimalist décor. She is wearing a refined and celebratory golden dress — with a luxurious satin sheen, delicate fitted bodice, and graceful draping that highlights her silhouette. The composition focuses on light gradients, shadows, and texture — golden icing, satin fabric, and glowing reflections on the cake stand. The mood feels refined, calm, and celebratory. Shot in RAW on Hasselblad 50mm, cinematic tone, editorial glamour.

A regal winter portrait of a woman standing outdoors in bright, crystal-clear daylight, framed from the chest up. She wears a luxurious white fur wrap and an ornate silver kokoshnik crown densely set with faceted crystals, pearls, and lace-like filigree; a fringe of dangling stones grazes her forehead. Long chandelier earrings echo the crown’s geometry, catching hard sunlight with sharp, specular sparkles. Her makeup is clean and luminous with velvety skin, pink-peach blush, glossy highlights on cheekbones, and a soft nude lip. She gazes directly into the camera with composed confidence, shoulders turned slightly three-quarter, neck elongated. Behind her, a snowy historical cityscape falls softly out of focus—multi-colored onion domes and gilded towers rising above a white riverbank under a deep blue sky. Lighting is crisp winter sun from high right with subtle fill, producing a bright key on her face, tight shadows along the crown lace, and glittering micro-reflections in each jewel. Atmosphere is cold, dry, and ultra-clear; breath-thin haze emphasizes distance. Shot RAW on Hasselblad 50mm, portrait composition, shallow depth of field with creamy bokeh, high microcontrast, hairline fibers and fur guard hairs rendered with lifelike texture, accurate white balance for snow, no text or UI.

A cinematic winter portrait of a woman framed chest-up against a panoramic Moscow city backdrop covered in snow. She wears a luxurious deep red fur coat and a matching red Russian winter hat made of thick, soft fur that covers her ears. The rich crimson tones of her outfit stand out vividly against the cool desaturated whites and silvers of the cityscape — the Kremlin towers, snow-dusted domes, and frozen river faintly visible in the softly blurred background. Her makeup is refined and elegant: luminous satin skin, warm rosy blush, subtle winged eyeliner, softly defined brows, and matte rose lips that harmonize with her red ensemble. She turns slightly three-quarter toward the camera, her gaze calm, poised, and self-assured. The lighting resembles crisp daylight after snowfall — clean frontal illumination with a subtle wrap and delicate rim light that highlights the fur texture and contours of her face. The atmosphere feels cold yet radiant, with light haze and suspended snow crystals adding a faint sparkle around her. Shot RAW on Hasselblad 50mm, portrait composition, shallow depth, fine detail in fur fibers, realistic skin texture, volumetric natural light, cinematic color contrast of deep red against icy blue-white tones, elegant winter mood with Moscow in the distance.

A sumptuous winter fashion portrait of a woman in a deep ruby-red fur mantle, framed chest-up against a panoramic mountain snowscape. She wears a golden kokoshnik crown richly embroidered with filigree and set with large clear crystals; teardrop chandelier earrings in gold echo the crown’s motifs. Her makeup is refined: satin skin with warm rosy blush, subtle winged liner, softly defined brows, natural matte-rose lips. She turns slightly three-quarter toward the lens and holds a serene, self-assured gaze. The background shows sunlit alpine peaks and snow fields rendered in soft focus, cool cerulean shadows in the snow contrasting the warm gold of the crown and the saturated red fur. Light is sharp high-altitude daylight with gentle wrap—clean key from front-left, delicate edge light along the crown and cheek, and crisp speculars on metal and stones; micro-sparkle blooms across the jewelry without clipping. Atmosphere is pristine, dry, with minimal haze; air feels cold and luminous. Shot RAW on Hasselblad 50mm, portrait framing, shallow DOF, precise detail in fur fibers and gold engravings, balanced highlights with smooth roll-off, cinematic color contrast between ruby, gold, and blue-white snow, no text or UI.

Create a vertical 2160x3840 px 4K cinematic composition of three horizontally stacked night scenes (top, middle, bottom) that merge seamlessly into one continuous analog-style frame — no visible light source, only soft reflected illumination and smooth tonal transitions.
Set in Paris at night near the Eiffel Tower, close enough for its golden lattice lights to softly fill the background. The air is cool, misty, with wind stirring strands of hair and light snow through the frame. Capture the mood of 90s analog film photography — visible grain, halation around highlights, shallow focus falloff, and faint amber date-stamp digits for authenticity.
Outfit (same in all scenes): a thick white faux-fur coat with subtle sheen, matching white fur hat, minimal luminous makeup with glossy lips; wind tousles her loose brunette hair for cinematic motion.
Scene 1 (top) — Extreme close-up: only her eyes visible above the fur collar. Soft ambient reflections from the Eiffel Tower and city lights illuminate her gaze. Wind shifts stray hairs across her face; snow particles shimmer faintly in shallow focus. The mood feels tactile, intimate, and cinematic.
Scene 2 (middle) — Back view: she stands with her back to the camera, facing the illuminated Eiffel Tower. Her silhouette glows gently from the surrounding city light, edges of her white coat and hat outlined by warm reflections. The wind lifts her hair and coat hem slightly, adding natural motion and emotional depth to the still night. The ambient glow and analog texture create a nostalgic Parisian calm.
Scene 3 (bottom) — Tight portrait: her face now fully visible, softly lit by diffused reflections of golden light. The wind moves through her hair and fur, capturing subtle texture and motion. The background melts into glowing halation and soft grain, evoking the tactile quality of 35mm film. Her expression is serene, gaze steady yet thoughtful, completing the cinematic narrative with quiet emotional resonance.
All three layers share the same wind motion, analog grain, halation glow, and soft Parisian night tone, forming a cohesive and nostalgic cinematic collage — elegant, timeless, and tactile like a real film contact sheet.

Create a vertical 2160x3840 px 4K cinematic composition of three horizontally stacked scenes (top, middle, bottom) that blend into one continuous frame — no black bars, only fluid transitions of snow, tone, and perspective.
Set at night on a mountain lake shore, the deep indigo sky fading into distant ridgelines. A direct on-camera flash freezes drifting snow, carving sharp reflections against dark surroundings. The night stays soft and velvety, with faint twilight glow on the horizon. Apply a film aesthetic — fine grain, gentle halation around bright snowflakes, and a small amber date stamp near the lower edge of top and bottom scenes.
Outfit (same in all scenes): thick white teddy coat, red wool scarf, red knit gloves, natural makeup with flushed cheeks; in Scene 2 she holds a winter bouquet of dried flowers and greens.
Scene 1 (top) — Back portrait: she stands facing the lake, long blonde hair falling over the white coat. The flash catches nearby snowflakes, turning them into glowing orbs. A wooden post anchors the frame; the lake and mountains dissolve into shadow.
Scene 2 (middle) — Side profile: she turns slightly left, both hands clasping the bouquet. Her head tilts upward, serene, snow drifting around. Flash highlights red gloves and scarf against the matte coat. The bouquet glimmers with small reflections, the horizon faintly lit behind.
Scene 3 (bottom) — Close-up portrait: her face fills the frame, eyes toward the lens. Snow rests on lashes and scarf, light creating soft catchlights and subtle vignette. Maintain identical flash tone and snow direction so all three layers unite into one elegant, analog night collage.

Create a **vertical 2160x3840 px 4K cinematic composition composed of two horizontally stacked scenes (top, bottom) that merge into one seamless polar tableau — no black borders, unified overcast light, identical snow and mist behavior across layers. Location: northern seaside with pack ice and distant snowy mountains under a pale gray sky; wind light, air crisp.

Epic wide shot of a majestic, snow-capped mountain range at sunrise or sunset. The lower mountains fall into deep shadow, forming a dark silhouette, while the highest peaks catch the intense warm orange-yellow light of the Alpenglow effect under a deep blue sky.

Extreme close-up (macro) of the lower face, focusing on full, glossy lips framed by a thick fur hood or collar. The woman wears large, squared black sunglasses.
Lighting: Dramatic, high-contrast, emphasizing the texture of the fur, the sheen of the lips, and the polished elegance of the composition.

Her hair flows from underneath the hat in soft waves, resting over the fur.The background shows a snowy forest with tall evergreen trees covered in frost. The light is soft and diffused, typical of an overcast winter day, casting even illumination across her face and the textured fur. The portrait composition is clean and centered, with the model close to the lens so the details of the fur, sunglasses, and hat are sharply defined.

Using my photo, create a hyper-realistic scene (save her facial features exactly as in the photo)
A winter outdoor portrait captured on a snow-covered ski slope, framed in a clean knee-up composition that brings the woman close to the camera. The camera is positioned at eye level, creating a direct, clear, centered view of her posture, outfit, and gear. She stands facing the camera with a slight shift of weight to one leg, giving the pose a confident, athletic balance. Her expression is calm, focused, and directed straight at the lens.
Her right hand holds a black ski helmet. The grip is relaxed but secure: her arm is extended slightly downward along the side of her body, with the helmet hanging naturally from her gloved hand. The helmet remains clearly visible in the lower right part of the frame.
Her left hand holds a pair of skis positioned diagonally across her shoulder. She grips them firmly at the binding area, with her elbow bent and lifted outward. The skis rest across the back of her shoulder at a slight upward angle, giving the pose structure and a clear sports silhouette. The gesture appears natural, stable, and confident.
She wears a fitted two-tone ski jacket with long sleeves — white in the center with contrasting black sleeves and side panels. The jacket has a sleek technical texture, a high collar, and a centered front zipper. Her trousers are bright burnt-orange winter ski pants with white vertical stripes along the sides. The fabric is structured, insulated, and matte, designed for winter sports. Black gloves complete the outfit.
She wears a black headband that holds her hair back, leaving her face fully visible. Her hair falls loosely over her shoulders.
The background shows a wide, open snowy slope with subtle tracks and distant brown hills under a soft overcast sky. The light is diffused and even, with no harsh shadows, giving the portrait a clean, crisp winter atmosphere. The composition is centered and stable, with her upper body, posture, and winter gear clearly emphasized.

data.subTitle: The main trend of the ending year

templates.promptTemplate: Top panel: a stark black-and-white wide shot of an Icelandic coastline at midday. Strong overhead light creates sharp highlights on the black volcanic sand while deep, dramatic shadows form along the jagged basalt cliffs. Cold waves roll in with bright white crests that cut through the dark shoreline. Low drifting mist softens the horizon but the overall contrast remains bold and graphic. No people are present — the frame focuses entirely on the raw, sculptural geometry of Icelandic nature rendered in harsh monochrome.Bottom panel: an intense, close black-and-white portrait of the woman. The framing is extremely tight — only her face is visible, no hands, no clothing. Wind pushes her hair across her cheeks and forehead, adding movement and tension to the static close-up. Her expression is calm but powerful, eyes steady and clear. Strong midday light creates crisp highlights along her nose, brows, and cheekbones, while deep shadows define the rest of her face. High-contrast monochrome film texture and subtle grain emphasize the dramatic, cinematic mood.

Top panel: extreme close-up of the woman’s eyes, capturing warm sunset reflections within her pupils while the surrounding air remains cold. Only her eyes and the upper curves of her cheeks are visible. Soft film halation blooms around the highlights, creating a dreamy Portra-like vintage atmosphere.
Middle panel: a sweeping wide shot of a distinctly Icelandic coastline at pastel pink-orange sunset. Dramatic basalt cliff formations, long stretches of black volcanic sand, cold white waves, and low drifting mist define the environment. The woman stands far in the distance, with her back fully turned to the camera, positioned near the waterline. Her small silhouette is framed by the monumental Icelandic landscape, emphasizing scale, solitude, and cinematic calm.
Bottom panel: an intimate close-up capturing only her lips, neck, and her hands cupped near her mouth as if warming them with her breath. The camera looks downward from above her face, keeping the framing tight — but in the blurred background behind her, the same Icelandic coastline from the second scene is faintly visible: black volcanic sand, soft pastel sunset light, distant basalt cliffs, and low coastal mist. The background remains soft and out of focus, maintaining the composition, while visually tying the scene to the same location. Warm sunset light highlights her skin and hands, enhanced by subtle film grain and delicate halation.

Top panel: an extreme close-up of the woman’s eyes, framed tightly from lashes to upper cheeks. Her eyes catch the soft, cold morning light of Iceland. No clothing is visible. Fine Portra 400 grain and subtle halation give the moment an intimate, cinematic tone.
Middle panel: a wide, atmospheric shot of a dramatic Icelandic cliffside overlooking the turbulent North Atlantic. The woman stands near the edge of the cliff wearing a very long, lightweight fabric beach dress, its soft cloth billowing dramatically in the wind. The flowing length of the dress moves in wide, wind-driven waves, echoing the motion of the distant ocean. Her body faces the horizon, and her gaze is fixed entirely on the distant landscape — never toward the camera. Early light outlines the rugged cliffs, the cold waves below, and the rising mist. The composition feels expansive, contemplative, and cinematic, with Portra grain and soft desaturated tones.
Bottom panel: a frontal portrait of the woman looking directly into the camera. The same long, airy beach dress is visible only in subtle soft folds around her shoulders and upper chest, gently lifted by the wind. Her face is beautifully illuminated by clear daytime natural light, revealing clean highlights on her cheeks, nose, and eyes. The crisp light contrasts with the cool Icelandic air, while her wind-moved hair frames her face. The blurred cliffside scenery behind her retains the same atmosphere as the middle panel. Shot on 35mm film (Kodak Portra 400) with visible grain, warm halation, and a delicate vintage mood.

Create a vertical 2160x3840 px 4K cinematic composition of three horizontally stacked night scenes (top, middle, bottom) that merge seamlessly into one continuous analog-style frame — no visible light source, only soft reflected illumination and smooth tonal transitions.
Set in Paris at night near the Eiffel Tower, close enough for its golden lattice lights to softly fill the background. The air is cool, misty, with wind stirring strands of hair and light snow through the frame. Capture the mood of 90s analog film photography — visible grain, halation around highlights, shallow focus falloff, and faint amber date-stamp digits for authenticity.
Outfit (same in all scenes): a thick white faux-fur coat with subtle sheen, matching white fur hat, minimal luminous makeup with glossy lips; wind tousles her loose brunette hair for cinematic motion.
Scene 1 (top) — Extreme close-up: only her eyes visible above the fur collar. Soft ambient reflections from the Eiffel Tower and city lights illuminate her gaze. Wind shifts stray hairs across her face; snow particles shimmer faintly in shallow focus. The mood feels tactile, intimate, and cinematic.
Scene 2 (middle) — Back view: she stands with her back to the camera, facing the illuminated Eiffel Tower. Her silhouette glows gently from the surrounding city light, edges of her white coat and hat outlined by warm reflections. The wind lifts her hair and coat hem slightly, adding natural motion and emotional depth to the still night. The ambient glow and analog texture create a nostalgic Parisian calm.
Scene 3 (bottom) — Tight portrait: her face now fully visible, softly lit by diffused reflections of golden light. The wind moves through her hair and fur, capturing subtle texture and motion. The background melts into glowing halation and soft grain, evoking the tactile quality of 35mm film. Her expression is serene, gaze steady yet thoughtful, completing the cinematic narrative with quiet emotional resonance.
All three layers share the same wind motion, analog grain, halation glow, and soft Parisian night tone, forming a cohesive and nostalgic cinematic collage — elegant, timeless, and tactile like a real film contact sheet.

Create a vertical 2160x3840 px 4K cinematic composition of three horizontally stacked scenes (top, middle, bottom) that blend into one continuous frame — no black bars, only fluid transitions of snow, tone, and perspective.
Set at night on a mountain lake shore, the deep indigo sky fading into distant ridgelines. A direct on-camera flash freezes drifting snow, carving sharp reflections against dark surroundings. The night stays soft and velvety, with faint twilight glow on the horizon. Apply a film aesthetic — fine grain, gentle halation around bright snowflakes, and a small amber date stamp near the lower edge of top and bottom scenes.
Outfit (same in all scenes): thick white teddy coat, red wool scarf, red knit gloves, natural makeup with flushed cheeks; in Scene 2 she holds a winter bouquet of dried flowers and greens.
Scene 1 (top) — Back portrait: she stands facing the lake, long blonde hair falling over the white coat. The flash catches nearby snowflakes, turning them into glowing orbs. A wooden post anchors the frame; the lake and mountains dissolve into shadow.
Scene 2 (middle) — Side profile: she turns slightly left, both hands clasping the bouquet. Her head tilts upward, serene, snow drifting around. Flash highlights red gloves and scarf against the matte coat. The bouquet glimmers with small reflections, the horizon faintly lit behind.
Scene 3 (bottom) — Close-up portrait: her face fills the frame, eyes toward the lens. Snow rests on lashes and scarf, light creating soft catchlights and subtle vignette. Maintain identical flash tone and snow direction so all three layers unite into one elegant, analog night collage.

Create a **vertical 2160x3840 px 4K cinematic composition composed of two horizontally stacked scenes (top, bottom) that merge into one seamless polar tableau — no black borders, unified overcast light, identical snow and mist behavior across layers. Location: northern seaside with pack ice and distant snowy mountains under a pale gray sky; wind light, air crisp.
Outfit (same in both scenes): white fur coat with a voluminous hood, matching texture framing the face; minimal jewelry (small gold hoops), natural lips, winter-rosy nose; snow grains caught in fur.
Scene 1 (top) — Extreme face portrait in the hood: the hood fills the frame edges; she looks directly at camera with clear, bright irises; soft falling snow passes the lens, some flakes sharp, others creamy bokeh. Overcast light is broad and flattering, producing delicate catchlights and fine skin texture.
Scene 2 (bottom) — Wide back view at the icy shore: she stands small, back to camera, centered against the frozen sea and distant white mountain massifs. Snow drifts laterally; a few ice floes punctuate the foreground. Her dark wavy hair spills from the hood; the coat’s white forms a clean silhouette against the gray water. Maintain identical horizon height and flake direction so both scenes fuse into a single, tranquil, arctic composition.

Create a vertical 2160x3840 px 4K cinematic collage consisting of three horizontally stacked alpine scenes (top, middle, bottom) blended into one continuous frame with unified color, light, and horizon. Location: open mountain ridge in full sunlight, clear air, pale blue sky. Outfit: white fur ushanka, shimmering silver beaded top, short white fur skirt, high white fur boots; eyelashes decorated with frost crystals. Lighting: bright, crisp, with soft natural reflections from snow.
Top scene — upper-body portrait: she adjusts the hat with both hands, subtle smile, mountains behind in smooth focus falloff.
Middle scene — full-back shot on the ridge: she stands small against vast mountains, holding her hat; snow sparkles under sun, soft wind lifting skirt hem slightly.
Bottom scene — extreme close-up of her eye with frosted lashes: perfect crystal texture, cool reflections of snow and sky; fur edge framing the close-up. Keep identical sky hue and sunlight direction across all three to preserve seamlessness.

Create a vertical 2160x3840 px 4K composition composed of three horizontally arranged panoramic scenes (top, middle, bottom) that form a continuous cinematic strip without gaps or transitions — snow, light, and perspective flow naturally between them. Location: a sunlit alpine ski resort under clear blue skies, distant ski lifts, crisp snow reflections. Outfit: red fitted ski suit, large white fur hat, black sunglasses; she sits relaxed in a wooden deck chair. Lighting: strong midday sun, high contrast, sharp shadows on snow.
Top scene — medium portrait: she reclines in the chair, sunglasses on, profile illuminated by direct sunlight; mountains softly blur behind her.
Middle scene — wide view from behind: she sits facing the bright open slope; several empty chairs align diagonally creating rhythm; textures of snow crisp and reflective.
Bottom scene — frontal medium portrait: she looks toward camera with subtle smile; reflections on lenses and fur hat catch sunlight; background remains softly defocused. Maintain continuous snow sparkle and directional light across all three frames for perfect coherence.

Create a vertical 2160x3840 px 4K composition consisting of three horizontally stacked scenes (top, middle, bottom) that blend into one continuous frame — no black borders or separations, only soft transitions of steam, snow, and dusk light.
Set in a secluded snowy forest at blue hour. A round wooden hot spring bath rests among snowdrifts; gentle steam rises into the cold twilight, dissolving the boundary between air and water. The palette mixes warm amber tones from the bath with cool evening blues, creating a balance of warmth and serenity.
Outfit: the woman wears a white fur hat throughout all scenes. In the top scene, she is wrapped in a wool shawl; in the lower scenes, only the hat remains visible above the water, emphasizing natural realism and atmospheric harmony.
Scene 1 (top) — Close portrait: her face is framed by the fur hat and drifting steam. Snowflakes melt softly on her lashes, blending warmth and frost. The light on her face is gentle and diffused, with no direct reflections or highlights in the eyes, maintaining a calm and natural appearance.
Scene 2 (middle) — Medium back view: she sits in the hot spring facing away from the camera, her shoulders bare above the waterline. The white fur hat stands out against the dark forest; steam rises into the cold air, merging with falling snow. The scene feels contemplative and intimate, illuminated by soft golden reflections on the water’s surface.
Scene 3 (bottom) — Tight side close-up: only her cheek, neck, and the fur hat are visible as light glides across her skin; droplets of condensation shimmer in the glow of the steam. The same drifting mist and snow continue across all layers, uniting them into a cohesive cinematic composition filled with silence, warmth, and the delicate contrast of fire and frost.

Create a vertical 2160x3840 px 4K cinematic composition consisting of three horizontally stacked scenes (top, middle, bottom) that merge seamlessly into one festive winter frame — no borders, unified atmosphere of light, snow, and warmth.
Set in a European Christmas market square surrounded by wooden kiosks, garlands, and old buildings. The mood is gentle, calm, and bright.
Outfit: she wears a white coat with a fur collar, white hat, and knitted mittens, holding a red paper cup of hot drink.
Scene 1 (top) — Portrait: she smiles softly while lifting the cup toward her lips, golden daylight reflecting in her eyes.
Scene 2 (middle) — Medium shot: she stands amid the market stalls; blurred garlands and people create bokeh depth; snowflakes fall around her.
Scene 3 (bottom) — Close-up of her hands holding the cup, breath visible in the cold air; light reflections and drifting snow continue seamlessly from the upper scenes.

Create a vertical 2160x3840 px 4K cinematic composition consisting of three horizontally stacked night scenes (top, middle, bottom) that merge smoothly into one continuous frame — no separations, unified color temperature and atmosphere.
Set in an alpine town at night, with faint streetlights and distant mountains. The mood is fashion-driven yet cinematic, contrasting hard light and shadow.
Outfit: she wears a brown fur trapper hat, an oversized black graphic tee, a black leather mini skirt, and tall black furry boots. Lighting: sharp key from one side, strong rim highlights on fur and leather.
Scene 1 (top) — Close portrait: her hair moves across her face in the wind; glossy highlights in her eyes; dark background with faint bokeh.
Scene 2 (middle) — Medium shot: she stands near a guardrail on a mountain overlook, neon reflections and cold moonlight tracing her silhouette.
Scene 3 (bottom) — Full-body back view on an empty parking lot: she stands alone under a bright top light; snow glitters on asphalt; long shadow falls behind her. The light progression remains smooth and coherent throughout all three frames.

Create a vertical 2160x3840 px 4K cinematic composition consisting of three horizontally stacked scenes (top, middle, bottom) that flow into one continuous sequence — same snow, tone, and light continuity across layers.
The narrative transitions from a quiet indoor portrait to the luminous motion of a winter city at night.
Outfit: she wears a white fur hat, beige wool coat, and matching scarf, with soft curls visible beneath the hat.
Scene 1 (top) — Studio close portrait: she faces the camera under gentle side lighting; slow snowflakes drift through the air; her gaze calm, intimate.
Scene 2 (middle) — Outdoor medium shot: she stands on a snowy street with warm streetlights behind her, face softly illuminated by shopfront reflections.
Scene 3 (bottom) — Night walk scene: she moves through glowing garlands and soft bokeh, snow whirling in backlight; her face turns slightly toward camera, lit by golden city light. The same tone of warmth and winter air unites all layers.

Create a vertical 2160x3840 px 4K cinematic composition consisting of three horizontally stacked scenes (top, middle, bottom) that blend seamlessly into a single bright winter frame — no borders, unified daylight and snowfall continuity. Location: open snowfield bordered by frost-laden trees under an overcast sky; light is soft, neutral, shadowless.
Outfit (same in all scenes): black puffer jacket, chunky black knit scarf layered high at the neck, black pants and gloves, clear (transparent) dome umbrella with visible ribs; small gold hoop earrings; natural glam makeup.
Scene 1 (top) — Portrait under umbrella: chest-up from front-left; she looks off-camera, umbrella canopy framing the head with translucent snow accumulation. Snowflakes land on scarf and jacket quilting; soft reflections appear on the plastic canopy; eyes sharp, skin clean.
Scene 2 (middle) — Wide back view across field: she stands from behind, centered, holding the open clear umbrella; tracks in the snow lead toward her. A band of frosted trees spans the horizon; light wind carries steady flakes; maintain shallow haze so trees sit slightly muted.
Scene 3 (bottom) — Tight under-canopy close-up: camera tucks near the umbrella rim; face fills the frame with crisp eye detail; individual snow crystals cling to the black knit scarf texture. Keep the umbrella’s edge and sparse condensation as foreground geometry, and match flake size/direction to the upper scenes for seamless continuity.

Create a single vertical 2160x3840 px 4K cinematic composition composed of three horizontally stacked winter scenes (TOP, MIDDLE, BOTTOM) that merge seamlessly into one continuous frame — no borders, no separations, one unified composition.
Set on a cold, calm winter morning inside and around a modern minimalist house surrounded by a snow-covered pine forest. The light is soft, overcast, and diffused, with a slightly blue cast reflecting from the snow, creating a tranquil cinematic atmosphere. The color palette blends white, muted beige, soft gray, and pale blue tones, capturing quiet refinement and stillness.
Outfit (same in all scenes): plush white bathrobe, slightly open at the neckline, loose brunette waves, natural bare makeup with satin-finish skin and soft reflective highlights.
TOP scene (extreme close-up portrait inside): a large, cinematic close-up of her face — only her eyes, nose, lips, and a hint of hair visible. The frame is intimate, with shallow depth of field and soft light from the window gently wrapping her skin. Snow-reflected daylight gives her complexion a cool, clean tone. The background is creamy and minimal, faint reflections suggesting the winter landscape beyond. Her gaze is calm and steady, evoking stillness and morning quiet.
MIDDLE scene (wide interior): shot from deeper inside, facing the panoramic glass wall. The woman stands with her back to the camera, in the same robe and light slippers, holding a glass of red wine in her right hand. She’s centered against the backdrop of tall, snow-covered pines outside the window. The minimalist room — pale wood flooring, neutral furniture, and natural cool daylight — enhances depth, balance, and serenity.
BOTTOM scene (close-up inside by the glass): a tight side profile, focusing on her eyes, cheek, and lips. The cool morning light from the snow outside creates delicate highlights and subtle reflections on the glass. The blurred outline of the forest glows behind her, merging interior and exterior tones. Her expression is serene, gaze thoughtful, skin luminous under the cold light.

Create a vertical 2160x3840 px 4K composition composed of two horizontal scenes that merge into one seamless frame — no black borders or separations, unified cinematic light and tone.
Set in a snowy plain during a quiet overcast day. The atmosphere is serene and introspective, with a sense of warmth amid the cold. The palette features ivory, pale beige, muted gray, and soft blush hues reflected by the snow.
Outfit: an ivory fur hat and matching coat, thick and voluminous, with visible natural texture and slight sheen. The same outfit continues across both frames to maintain visual continuity and mood.
Frame 1 — Close-up: the woman’s face partially framed by the soft fur, her gaze calm and thoughtful. Snowflakes drift through the shallow depth of field, creating cinematic bokeh and a sense of peaceful stillness.
Frame 2 — Medium shot: the same woman sits inside a car, looking through a frosted window. The light outside diffuses gently across the glass, blending with the ivory tones of the fur and the snow-covered landscape, creating a soft visual harmony.

Create a vertical 2160x3840 px 4K composition composed of two horizontal scenes that merge into one seamless frame — no black borders or separations, unified cinematic light and tone.
Set in a frozen mountain landscape near a still lake and distant glaciers, softly covered in falling snow. The atmosphere is calm, reflective, and cinematic — evoking quiet solitude and the beauty of isolation. The palette combines cold whites, muted blues, and soft beige tones with subtle golden highlights from the daylight.
Outfit: a voluminous white faux-fur coat, plush and textured, slightly open at the shoulders, remains consistent across both frames. The fur captures soft light and adds warmth against the vast cold environment.
Frame 1 — Close-up: the woman’s face framed by the soft fur hood, with a serene and calm expression. Snowflakes rest lightly on the coat and hair, while diffused light enhances the texture and depth of the fur.
Frame 2 — Back view: the same woman stands with her back to the camera, near a frozen lake surrounded by mountains. The coat drapes loosely over her shoulders while soft snow continues to fall, creating a cinematic sense of scale and serenity.

Create a vertical 2160x3840 px 4K composition consisting of three horizontally stacked scenes that blend seamlessly into one continuous vertical frame — no black bars, borders, or separations, only smooth light and perspective transitions. Set in a remote winter landscape surrounded by frozen lakes, wooden cabins, and distant snow-covered mountains. The mood is poetic and contemplative, filled with solitude and cinematic stillness. The palette mixes cool whites, desaturated blues, and earthy browns illuminated by soft daylight through overcast skies. Outfit: the woman wears the same brown sheepskin coat in all three scenes — matte texture with visible natural grain, a plush fur collar, and structured shoulders. The coat feels heavy, warm, and tactile, catching the diffused light in soft gradients. Scene 1 — Portrait: the woman stands outdoors in the open winter landscape, her profile softly lit against the pale, snowy background. The brown sheepskin creates a warm contrast with the cold outside light. Her expression is serene, lost in quiet thought. Scene 2 — Full-body: she stands with her back to the camera, centered in the composition, facing the frozen expanse of a lake under a pale gray sky. The long brown coat drapes naturally to her knees, its fur collar lifted slightly by the wind. Snowflakes swirl gently around her as the horizon blurs into mist. The composition emphasizes isolation and depth. Scene 3 — Portrait: a close-up of her face framed by the same brown fur collar and hood, with snow resting on her eyelashes and coat. Lighting is soft, cinematic, and cold — highlighting delicate details of the fabric and skin.

Create a vertical 2160x3840 px 4K composition consisting of three horizontally stacked scenes that blend seamlessly into one vertical frame — no black bands or separations, only natural transitions through light and perspective.
Set in a remote winter landscape surrounded by frozen lakes and distant wooden cabins. The tone is poetic and melancholic — solitude mixed with quiet power. The palette shifts between cool gray, icy blue, and white tones, with soft natural illumination.
Outfit: the woman wears the same gray sheepskin coat in all scenes — matte texture, plush collar, and structured shoulders. The fabric catches diffused light with subtle contrast, merging naturally with the snowy surroundings.
Scene 1 — Portrait: captured inside a vehicle with window frost visible behind her. The gray sheepskin contrasts with her skin, and soft reflections create cinematic depth.
Scene 2 — Full-body: she stands still at the center of a frozen lake, facing away from the camera. The coat flows naturally, textured by the wind, as the horizon stretches endlessly into snow and mist.
Scene 3 — Close-up: her face framed tightly in the same coat collar, snowflakes suspended midair. The lighting is crisp yet soft, highlighting her calm expression and the tactile depth of the coat’s fabric.

Create a seamless vertical 2160x3840 px 4K composition with three cinematic scenes, unified tone and light, flowing naturally without black bars or separations.
Set by a northern sea with ice and wind; waves freeze mid-motion under soft cold light. The scene feels vast, elemental, and introspective — a balance between human presence and untamed nature.
Outfit: the same off-white fur coat appears in all frames — structured, minimal, slightly wind-blown, blending elegantly with the snowy and icy environment.
Scene 1 — Portrait: her face framed softly against the gray horizon, the wind weaving through the fur collar. Snow drifts across the shallow focus, evoking motion and fragility.
Scene 2 — Full-body: she stands with her back to the camera at the edge of the frozen shoreline, wearing fitted winter trousers beneath the coat, complementing the overall tone of the outfit. The off-white coat ripples slightly in the sea wind, and her footprints trail behind in the snow. The endless icy ocean stretches ahead, merging into the cloudy horizon, capturing solitude and vastness.
Scene 3 — Close-up: a side view with delicate motion blur as snow and salt mist swirl through the air. The fur texture catches tiny crystals of ice, creating a tactile cinematic realism.

Create a vertical 2160x3840 px 4K composition with three connected scenes, merging seamlessly without black bars or visual separations.
Set deep within a quiet pine forest just after snowfall. The air is still, light filtered through tall trees, snow thick on the branches. The mood is calm, cinematic, and introspective, filled with the quiet energy of untouched nature.
Outfit: the woman wears the same beige fur coat throughout — dense, structured, soft sheen, blending naturally with the muted tones of the forest.
Scene 1 — Portrait: a close-up under falling snow, the forest softly blurred behind her. The diffused light outlines her face and fur, highlighting textures with gentle contrast.
Scene 2 — Full-body: she stands with her back to the camera on a narrow forest path surrounded by tall pines, snow falling gently around her. The beige fur coat stands out against the dark bark and white snow, its surface catching the faint light filtering through the trees. Her posture conveys stillness and reflection, emphasizing solitude within the vast forest.
Scene 3 — Medium shot: her hand brushes snow off a branch, flakes caught midair. The diagonal light from above creates cinematic depth and soft interplay of shadow and glow.

Create a vertical 2160x3840 px 4K composition divided into three horizontal scenes that flow seamlessly into one continuous image — no black bars, no separations.
Set on a high mountain plateau covered in fresh snow at dawn, as the horizon glows softly with pink and silver light. The mood is quiet, hopeful, and cinematic.
Outfit: the woman wears the same long white fur coat in all three scenes — soft, voluminous, with a subtle sheen under the early morning light.
Scene 1 — Portrait: her face framed by the fur hood, eyes reflecting the first light of dawn, a serene expression of calm focus.
Scene 2 — Full-body: she stands with her back to the camera, coat flowing in the wind as fog moves over the snow. Mountains fade into pale mist behind her.
Scene 3 — Close-up: her profile captured in the soft sunrise light, snowflakes glistening on the fur collar, breath visible in the cold air.

Create a vertical 2160x3840 px 4K composition divided into three horizontal scenes that flow seamlessly into one continuous image — no black bars, no separations.
Set in a northern pine forest clearing after a heavy snowfall at dawn, where soft fog lingers between the trees and the first light glows in tones of pink, silver, and muted blue. The mood is calm, cinematic, and introspective — a moment suspended between night and day.
Outfit: the man wears the same shearling coat in all three scenes — thick, structured, and lined with warm fur. The matte texture of the coat contrasts with the reflective frost and snow, subtly catching the cool morning light.
Scene 1 — Portrait: he faces the camera directly, standing still in the cold air. His gaze is steady and thoughtful, framed by the raised shearling collar. Snowflakes drift in front of him, softly blurring toward the lens. The light outlines his silhouette and the texture of the coat, creating depth and realism.
Scene 2 — Full-body: he stands with his back to the camera, the shearling coat slightly open as mist curls around his figure. The forest fades into a pale haze behind him, emphasizing isolation and serenity.
Scene 3 — Close-up: his profile is caught in the faint dawn light, breath visible in the cold, tiny frost crystals forming along the coat’s fur. The tone remains cinematic and quiet — a study in solitude and early light.
Lighting: diffused dawn glow filtered through snow and fog, Palette: white, beige, soft gray, pale pink, Camera: Hasselblad 50mm, RAW, cinematic atmosphere, natural light diffusion

Create a vertical 2160x3840 px 4K composition divided into three horizontal scenes that flow seamlessly into one continuous image — no black bars, no separations.
Set in an open mountain pass during a snowstorm at dusk, where heavy clouds hang low and gusts of wind carry fine snow across the rugged terrain. The atmosphere is raw, cinematic, and elemental — a sense of quiet endurance against nature’s vastness.
Outfit: the man wears the same gray shearling coat in all three scenes — heavy, structured, and visibly weathered, with coarse, matte leather and thick fur lining. The texture feels rough, tactile, and built for cold — the kind of outerwear that looks lived-in and resilient.
Scene 1 — Extreme close-up: only his eyes are visible beneath the hood and the raised shearling collar. Snow dusts his lashes, and wind sweeps across his face. The gaze is steady, piercing through the cold mist, conveying strength and endurance. The rest of the frame is blurred by motion and wind, emphasizing the raw immediacy of the moment.
Scene 2 — Full-body: he stands with his back to the camera, on an uneven ridge where the snow whips across the ground. The gray shearling contrasts sharply against the white blizzard and dark mountain silhouettes. His posture is firm, facing into the storm as fog and light merge on the horizon.
Scene 3 — Medium close-up: side view, his profile partially covered by the fur collar. Snowflakes stick to the coarse fabric, and faint motion blur captures the wind’s energy. The lighting catches the edge of the coat and his breath in the frozen air, creating a cinematic balance between chaos and stillness.
Lighting: cold twilight tones with diffused blue-gray highlights, Palette: gray, white, muted steel blue, dark taupe, Camera: Hasselblad 50mm, RAW, cinematic realism, subtle motion haze from wind and snow

Create a vertical 2160x3840 px 4K composition divided into three horizontal scenes that merge seamlessly into one continuous cinematic frame — no black bars, no separations. Set deep within a rocky mountain gorge, surrounded by towering cliffs of dark stone partially covered with patches of snow and ice. Narrow shafts of cold light break through the rocks above, scattering faint mist into silver beams. The mood is tense yet majestic — a balance of isolation, resilience, and quiet power. Outfit: the man wears the same rough gray shearling coat throughout all scenes — thick, heavy, textured with visible wear, matte leather, and dense fur lining. The coat appears practical and raw, harmonizing with the rugged environment. Frost and dust from the mountains cling to the edges, giving it a natural, weather-beaten realism. Scene 1 — Extreme close-up: his face is visible above the raised shearling collar. The background is dim, showing blurred fragments of stone and light filtering through the mist. His gaze is intense, sharp, and unwavering, reflecting both focus and endurance. Fine particles of ice drift across the frame, adding depth and movement. Scene 2 — Full-body: he stands with his back to the camera, facing the narrow gorge where light spills between massive stone walls. The ground beneath is a mix of snow and dark rock; his figure contrasts against the cool bluish light bouncing off the cliffs. The composition feels powerful and cinematic — one man against monumental nature. Scene 3 — Medium close-up: profile view, the rugged shearling coat catching fragments of reflected light from the wet rock surfaces. Mist swirls around his shoulders, softening the harsh stone edges. Snowflakes melt on the leather surface, revealing faint highlights. The atmosphere evokes solitude and determination, framed by the ancient stillness of stone. Lighting: cold natural light filtered through rock gaps and mist, Palette: gray, slate blue, white, muted earth tones, Camera: Hasselblad 50mm, RAW, cinematic detail and volumetric light diffusion.

Vertical Triptych (three stacked horizontal panels).
Theme: Luxury Winter Mountain Fashion Editorial.
Triptych Structure and Details:
1. Top Panel (Portrait):
Close-up of a woman wearing a luxurious brown fur coat. Her head is covered with a beige and yellow striped silk scarf tied under the chin, with a baseball cap worn over the scarf. She is seated on a weathered wooden bench against a rustic wooden wall.
Lighting: Harsh, high-contrast Golden Hour sunlight, creating strong directional shadows and rich texture on the fur and wood.
2. Middle Panel (Landscape):
Epic wide shot of a majestic, snow-capped mountain range at sunrise or sunset. The lower mountains fall into deep shadow, forming a dark silhouette, while the highest peaks catch the intense warm orange-yellow light of the Alpenglow effect under a deep blue sky.
3. Bottom Panel (Detail):
Extreme close-up (macro) of the lower face, focusing on full, glossy lips framed by a thick fur hood or collar. The woman wears large, squared black sunglasses.
Lighting: Dramatic, high-contrast, emphasizing the texture of the fur, the sheen of the lips, and the polished elegance of the composition.
Aesthetic and Technical Modifiers:
High Fashion Editorial, Glamour, Après Ski aesthetic, cinematic photography, ultra-detailed, photorealistic, 8K, sharp focus, rich tactile textures (fur, silk, wood), high contrast lighting and cinematic tonality.

Vertical Triptych three stacked horizontal panels. Top panel: An extreme close-up on her eyes, with the scarf covering the lower face. Middle panel: A wide shot showing her small figure walking away across the vast snowy field. Bottom panel: A profile shot of her face tilted upwards, eyes closed, enjoying the sunlight. Style & Technical Details: Shot on 35mm film Kodak Portra 400. Visible film grain, slight color shift, and vintage aesthetic. Bright, warm winter sunlight creating strong backlight rim light and subtle lens flare. High dynamic range, soft focus, cinematic photography.

Top panel: a stark black-and-white wide shot of an Icelandic coastline at midday. Strong overhead light creates sharp highlights on the black volcanic sand while deep, dramatic shadows form along the jagged basalt cliffs. Cold waves roll in with bright white crests that cut through the dark shoreline. Low drifting mist softens the horizon but the overall contrast remains bold and graphic. No people are present — the frame focuses entirely on the raw, sculptural geometry of Icelandic nature rendered in harsh monochrome.Bottom panel: an intense, close black-and-white portrait of the woman. The framing is extremely tight — only her face is visible, no hands, no clothing. Wind pushes her hair across her cheeks and forehead, adding movement and tension to the static close-up. Her expression is calm but powerful, eyes steady and clear. Strong midday light creates crisp highlights along her nose, brows, and cheekbones, while deep shadows define the rest of her face. High-contrast monochrome film texture and subtle grain emphasize the dramatic, cinematic mood.

Top panel: extreme close-up of the woman’s eyes, capturing warm sunset reflections within her pupils while the surrounding air remains cold. Only her eyes and the upper curves of her cheeks are visible. Soft film halation blooms around the highlights, creating a dreamy Portra-like vintage atmosphere.
Middle panel: a sweeping wide shot of a distinctly Icelandic coastline at pastel pink-orange sunset. Dramatic basalt cliff formations, long stretches of black volcanic sand, cold white waves, and low drifting mist define the environment. The woman stands far in the distance, with her back fully turned to the camera, positioned near the waterline. Her small silhouette is framed by the monumental Icelandic landscape, emphasizing scale, solitude, and cinematic calm.
Bottom panel: an intimate close-up capturing only her lips, neck, and her hands cupped near her mouth as if warming them with her breath. The camera looks downward from above her face, keeping the framing tight — but in the blurred background behind her, the same Icelandic coastline from the second scene is faintly visible: black volcanic sand, soft pastel sunset light, distant basalt cliffs, and low coastal mist. The background remains soft and out of focus, maintaining the composition, while visually tying the scene to the same location. Warm sunset light highlights her skin and hands, enhanced by subtle film grain and delicate halation.

Top panel: an extreme close-up of the woman’s eyes, framed tightly from lashes to upper cheeks. Her eyes catch the soft, cold morning light of Iceland. No clothing is visible. Fine Portra 400 grain and subtle halation give the moment an intimate, cinematic tone.
Middle panel: a wide, atmospheric shot of a dramatic Icelandic cliffside overlooking the turbulent North Atlantic. The woman stands near the edge of the cliff wearing a very long, lightweight fabric beach dress, its soft cloth billowing dramatically in the wind. The flowing length of the dress moves in wide, wind-driven waves, echoing the motion of the distant ocean. Her body faces the horizon, and her gaze is fixed entirely on the distant landscape — never toward the camera. Early light outlines the rugged cliffs, the cold waves below, and the rising mist. The composition feels expansive, contemplative, and cinematic, with Portra grain and soft desaturated tones.
Bottom panel: a frontal portrait of the woman looking directly into the camera. The same long, airy beach dress is visible only in subtle soft folds around her shoulders and upper chest, gently lifted by the wind. Her face is beautifully illuminated by clear daytime natural light, revealing clean highlights on her cheeks, nose, and eyes. The crisp light contrasts with the cool Icelandic air, while her wind-moved hair frames her face. The blurred cliffside scenery behind her retains the same atmosphere as the middle panel. Shot on 35mm film (Kodak Portra 400) with visible grain, warm halation, and a delicate vintage mood.

Transform the uploaded person into a highly realistic 3D collectible figurine standing on a desk. The figurine must keep the exact pose from the uploaded photo. Use a clean premium support structure: a small circular base beneath the feet, and a slim transparent acrylic support arm rising from the back edge of the base and gently attaching at the waist with a soft clamp. The support must never touch the lower back or hips and must always stand firmly on the desk surface, fully visible and physically correct.
Place the figurine in a modern but realistic everyday workspace — not futuristic and not domestic. Each generation should show a different believable environment, such as a creative office desk, a designer’s table, an illustrator’s workstation, a photography prep desk, a craftsman’s studio table, or a typical modern workspace with practical tools. The style should feel grounded and familiar: wooden or laminated desks, simple shelves, desk organizers, notebooks, coffee mugs, color palettes, cutting mats, sketchbooks, pencils, small tools, or light electronic devices. The exact items should vary each time to keep the workspace fresh and unique.
Behind the figurine, place a large computer monitor showing the same figurine inside a 3D modeling software viewport, perfectly matching its pose and details.
Next to the figurine, add a branded collector’s box featuring the printed artwork of the same figurine on the front. The box should look professionally produced — clean, glossy, and clearly visible on the desk.
Lighting should be warm, soft, and natural — like a well-lit creative workspace during the day. Gentle shadows, mild reflections on the desk, and soft highlight transitions should give the scene a realistic, cinematic, and comfortable atmosphere. The figurine, its support stand, and the packaging box should remain the main visual focus.

Using my photo, create a hyper-realistic scene (save her facial features exactly as in the photo).
Scene:
A hyper-realistic scene set in the Hogwarts Dueling Club, where the woman is engaged in a magical duel. The camera is positioned slightly behind and over the shoulder of her opponent, so the viewer sees the blurred silhouette of a student’s head and shoulder in the foreground, partially blocking the frame. This creates the feeling that we are standing in the exact place of her rival.
Look:
She wears a full Hogwarts student uniform appropriate for a dueling setting.
Pose:
She faces forward with full intensity, her wand aimed directly toward the camera as if casting a spell at the opponent. Her posture remains strong and focused.
Details:
Her expression is focused, confident, and filled with controlled power. The background is alive with spell streaks cutting across the air, sparks erupting from clashing magic, and bursts of light illuminating the hall. Other students stand in the distance watching the duel, their faces lit by the glowing flashes. The atmosphere is dense with drifting smoke and glowing particles.
Lighting & Style:
Contrast-heavy lighting with strong highlights from spell explosions and deep dramatic shadows shaping the scene. Colors from spells illuminate the environment with cinematic intensity.
Quality:
Shot as an 8K cinematic photograph, Sony A7R IV RAW, ultra-sharp details, realistic motion blur and particle effects, maximum clarity and texture fidelity.

A Hogwarts classroom where the woman is casting the spell “Wingardium Leviosa.”

She wears a full Hogwarts student uniform: dark wizarding robe draped over a classic school outfit with white shirt, house-colored tie, fitted vest, and traditional uniform elements.
Pose:
Her robe moves slightly as she performs the spell, adding realism and motion. The object in front of her wand begins rising toward the camera.
Details:
The camera is positioned directly in front at a slightly lowered cinematic angle, matching the reference. She looks straight into the lens with focused intensity. Behind her, Hogwarts students at their desks watch the magic with curiosity and amazement. Warm sunlight streams through tall stained-glass windows, filling the classroom with a golden glow.
Lighting & Style:
Soft golden natural light from windows, warm classroom ambience, cinematic depth, realistic spell illumination.
Quality:
Rendered as a real cinematic 8K photograph, Sony A7R IV RAW, maximum precision in uniform texture, spell effects, environment detail, and facial accuracy.

Scene:
She is flying on a broom during an intense Quidditch match in the Hogwarts stadium.
Look:
She wears her house’s athletic Quidditch uniform, with her robe billowing dramatically in the wind.
Pose:
Her posture matches the reference: leaning forward with determination, broom angled dynamically, body positioned for flight.
Details:
The camera is slightly below and in front of her, creating a powerful forward-motion perspective. Other players fly in the sky around her; spectators cheer in the stands. Background elements blur with directional motion, emphasizing speed. Sunlight highlights her face and uniform folds, while the field below creates depth and dynamic energy.
Lighting & Style:
Bright cinematic sunlight, strong directional highlights, dynamic shadows, motion blur consistent with high-speed movement.
Quality:
Ultra-realistic 8K cinematic rendering, Sony A7R IV RAW, sharp micro-details on uniform, broom, sky, and environment.
