Using my photo, create a hyper-realistic portrait composition set in the Great Hall of Hogwarts, where the woman (keep her facial features exactly as in the photo) is sitting on a long wooden bench with the Sorting Hat placed on her head. She is not wearing a robe, but a stylish everyday outfit that fits naturally into the magical world while remaining comfortable and elegant. She looks directly into the camera, her expression focused with a hint of nervous excitement as the hat decides which house she will be placed into.
The camera angle, framing, and composition must fully match the reference: a centered, vertical, close-to-mid-length portrait shot, captured from a straight frontal perspective. The woman is positioned exactly in the middle of the frame, with her hands resting neatly on her lap, the Sorting Hat occupying the upper part of the image, and the background symmetrically aligned with the large window, floating candles, and house crests. The depth, scale, and character placement should mirror the reference precisely.
Around her, other students watch the moment intently. In the background, enormous windows reveal the night sky, and floating candles illuminate the entire hall. The walls are decorated with the house crests, and at the center stands the long staff table where the professors are seated. The lighting is warm and soft, with a magical glow from the candles enhancing the atmosphere of anticipation. The whole scene should look like a real photograph with cinematic 8K processing, where every detail—from the Sorting Hat’s magic to her facial expression—is rendered with maximum clarity.

Scene:
A scene on Platform 9¾ where the woman is standing on the platform waiting for the Hogwarts Express.
Look:
She is wearing her full Hogwarts travel outfit exactly as in the original description: a dark wizarding robe worn over her classic school clothing — a crisp white shirt, a house-colored tie, a fitted vest, and structured uniform pieces appropriate for a Hogwarts student preparing to depart for school. The robe drapes naturally over her frame, with soft folds and realistic fabric weight. She holds a suitcase in her hand, completing the travel look.
Pose:
She stands centered in the frame, holding her suitcase with a neutral, composed posture. Her gaze is directed straight into the camera without added emotion.
Details:
The camera angle, framing, and composition must match the reference exactly: a vertically framed mid-length portrait captured from a slightly lowered frontal angle. She stands in the foreground with the Hogwarts Express directly behind her. Other students move around her with luggage, adding depth and motion. Steam from the train fills the background. The station’s metal arches and brick walls form symmetrical lines that frame the subject.
Lighting & Style:
Warm evening-toned illumination mixed with soft steam glow. Cinematic, atmospheric station lighting enhances the magical ambience.
Quality:
Cinematic 8K photograph, Sony A7R IV RAW, ultra-detailed textures on robes, fabric, steam, bricks, metal structures, and the Hogwarts Express.

templates.promptTemplate:
I use my selfie for the female figure, keeping the face unchanged and natural.

Glamorous portrait of the 80s in a half-body against a studio background in a pastel pink haze.
The model is wearing a metallic cobalt blue dress with a deep V-neck and large shoulder pads, a black belt from the 80s, a careless voluminous hairstyle, spectacular bright blue eye shadow, shiny red lips and huge earrings in the form of crystal chandeliers.
Add New Year's accents: vintage Soviet tinsel, gently thrown over your shoulder., 

Lighting: soft glamorous glow, pink haze at the back, beautiful softbox at the front, aesthetics of a fashion magazine, high-detail fabrics and jewelry. Analog aesthetics of the 90s, cinematic color reproduction, shallow depth of field, film grain, gloomy realism.

A cinematic retro photo based on my selfie for the female figure, face kept natural and unchanged.
Interior of a classic Soviet train compartment at night: brown vinyl seats, fold-down table, lace curtains on the window, fogged glass with winter darkness outside, dim yellow compartment lamp.
On the table: a glass with tea in a metal podstakannik, sugar cubes, a peeled mandarin, folded paper tickets, a small newspaper.
The woman is seated on the lower bunk.

- Fitted ribbed tank top in warm beige, sculpting the silhouette with a second-skin effect.  
- High-waisted tailored trousers in a slightly darker sand tone, exuding effortless refinement.  
- Double-belted waist detail with silver buckles, cinching the waist and adding a structured, utilitarian edge.  
- Oversized camel trench coat draped over her shoulders, evoking classic elegance with an undone approach.  
#### Accessories:  
- Chunky gold chain necklace, bold yet refined, complementing the monochrome outfit.  
- Dark oversized sunglasses with a sharp, angular frame, enhancing the polished, high-fashion appeal.  
- Minimalist gold hoop earrings, subtly adding sophistication.  
#### Background & Lighting:  
- Softly blurred backdrop.    
- Natural, diffused lighting, casting subtle shadows and accentuating the rich textures of the fabrics.  
#### Color Palette:  
- Warm neutrals: Beige, camel, and taupe, creating a monochrome, luxe effect.  
- Gold accents: Jewelry and belt details subtly contrast against the matte fabrics.  
#### Mood & Style:  
- A fusion of sophisticated minimalism and modern power dressing.  
- The structured yet effortless styling conveys a sense of wealth without excess.  
- Inspired by the "quiet luxury" movement, where refinement speaks louder than logos.

This image encapsulates stealth wealth and quiet luxury, where every element speaks of high-quality craftsmanship, timeless style, and an effortlessly confident presence.

data.title: Selfie
data.description: You’re the star of the frame

templates.promptTemplate: A waist-up selfie-style composition captured in the midst of a vast desert sandstorm. The woman stands facing the front-facing camera, her head wrapped tightly in a traditional desert headscarf that fully covers her hair and neck, but leaves her face completely visible. Her features are uncovered, sharply defined against the swirling chaos — sand clings to her cheeks, brows, and lashes, giving her a weathered, elemental presence. Her gaze is locked directly into the lens, steady and fearless, her lips slightly parted as she breathes through the storm. She wears a fully modest outfit — a high-collared, long-sleeved robe made of textured, wind-resistant fabric that billows slightly with the force of the gusts. Behind her, vague outlines of crumbling pyramids or stone ruins shimmer through the golden haze. Light bursts through the airborne dust in fractured shafts, striking her face and garment in flashes of celestial brilliance. The air around her dances with illuminated particles, capturing a sense of motion and stillness at once. The mood is biblical and timeless — a portrait of endurance and clarity within a collapsing world. Shot in cinematic RAW, waist-up framing, with atmospheric grain, directional light, and sculptural sand textures frozen in high-speed detail.

a woman is taking a selfie standing on the edge of a skyscraper rooftop at dawn, high above a silent city blanketed in dense white fog, the vertical image is framed in a classic handheld selfie composition, with the camera held at arm’s length slightly above eye level and angled down toward her face, the woman is centered in the frame, captured from mid-torso to just above the head, while her other arm hangs fully relaxed by her side, she looks into the camera with a distant, introspective expression, her straight hair moves lightly in the breeze, behind her the entire skyline is submerged in milk-white mist, with only the tips of a few tall buildings piercing through, her long dark coat flutters gently in the wind, open over a soft high-neck sweater in pale grey tones, the light is soft, cold and diffused, coming from the pale blue morning sky and filtered through fog, creating a muted, atmospheric glow on her skin and clothes, the air feels still and elevated, the atmosphere is quiet, contemplative and detached, evoking solitude and serenity at altitude, the image is taken in RAW with a 35mm focal length to preserve cinematic depth, soft contrast, and immersive vertical scale

a woman is taking a selfie in the middle of a vast desert landscape at night, surrounded by silence and scattered stones under a deep starlit sky, the vertical image is framed closely from mid-torso to above the head, with the woman centered in the frame, holding the camera at arm’s length with one hand while her other arm hangs fully relaxed at her side, she looks into the camera with a calm, mesmerized expression, her straight hair slightly lifted by the night breeze, behind her a massive meteor blazes across the sky in a long fiery arc, glowing with bright orange and white light as it descends toward the distant desert horizon, its glow casts sharp highlights on the sand and silhouettes nearby rock formations, smaller meteors streak around it in the background, but the central fireball dominates the scene, the reflection of its flame flickers across her face and neck, she wears a buttoned-up lightweight desert shirt with long sleeves rolled just below the elbow, made of breathable fabric that moves softly in the wind, the sand glows faintly under the cosmic light, the atmosphere is otherworldly, electric and vast, evoking a sense of awe, tension and the quiet majesty of a rare celestial event, the photo is taken in RAW with a 35mm focal length, capturing rich night textures, cosmic illumination and immersive spatial depth

a woman is taking a selfie inside the vintage interior of a 1920s zeppelin gondola during daytime, the vertical portrait is framed in a close composition from mid-torso to slightly above the head, with the woman centered in the frame and close to the lens, holding the camera at arm’s length with one hand while her other arm hangs naturally straight down by her side, her face is softly lit by the ambient light entering from tall curved windows behind her, through which drifting clouds and the distant outlines of cities far below are visible, she gazes calmly into the camera with a composed expression, slightly lifting one eyebrow, she wears a tailored cream blouse with a high collar and pearl buttons, and a structured waistcoat, the lighting is warm and diffused, coming from the sky outside and reflecting off the polished wood and brass details inside the gondola, the atmosphere is elegant, nostalgic and serene, evoking the golden age of air travel, the image is captured in RAW on a 35mm lens for soft cinematic depth, fine texture, and timeless visual clarity

a woman is taking a selfie on the summit of mount everest under intense daylight and thin, crisp air, the vertical image is closely framed, with the woman facing the camera directly, her expression is calm and steady, a faint smile forming as she documents the moment, her cheeks are slightly flushed from the cold and her lips dry from altitude, she wears a bright insulated down suit with high-altitude climbing gear, ropes and carabiners clipped to her harness, frost clings to her collar and strands of her hair, her face is fully visible, framed by the opened hood of her suit, behind her the jagged ridge lines of the himalayas stretch into the blue distance under a clear sky, prayer flags flap in the background caught in strong winds, the sunlight is harsh and high, casting hard shadows and glinting off ice and metal surfaces, the photo is taken in RAW with a 35mm focal length, emphasizing sharp detail and harsh yet beautiful extremes, the atmosphere is heroic, cold and emotionally quiet — the highest point on earth captured in a single breath

a woman is taking a selfie seated in the cockpit of a jet fighter, flying high above the landscape at sunset, the vertical frame is tightly composed with her face centered and smiling brightly, she looks directly into the camera, dressed in a dark aviation flight suit and secured with a grey harness, wearing a glossy pilot helmet with the visor lifted, behind her the jet’s canopy reflects the orange-pink sky and distant river patterns below, warm sunset light comes from the side and rear, wrapping softly around her helmet and face while creating cinematic highlights on the metal surfaces, the scene is shot in RAW with a 35mm lens for realism and focus, evoking excitement, freedom, and a surreal sense of flying through golden skies

a woman is taking a selfie from a wooden lifeboat during golden hour, the scene is framed in a vertical cinematic portrait with the woman positioned in the foreground, smiling softly and looking directly into the camera, behind her looms the dramatic silhouette of a historic ocean liner that is visibly sinking — half of its grand structure is already submerged in the calm blue water, its bow dipped and tilting forward, while the remaining visible half features glowing portholes and towering smokestacks casting warm yellow light, contrasting with the deepening twilight sky, subtle smoke still trails upward from one funnel, the reflection of the ship flickers unevenly on the water's surface, intensifying the sense of motion and crisis, the woman is dressed in a vintage-style ivory dress with delicate lace details and puffed sleeves, complemented by a straw boater hat adorned with a white ribbon and small flower, the golden light from the horizon and the last working ship lights softly illuminates her face and dress, casting warm, nostalgic tones across the scene, the image is captured in RAW with a 35mm lens to retain clarity, fine detail and emotional depth, evoking a haunting blend of elegance, suspense, and bittersweet calm at sea

a woman is taking a selfie outdoors in a snowy landscape at twilight with the northern lights glowing in green and purple hues above the mountains, the scene is captured in a cinematic vertical format with the woman framed close to the lens, holding the camera at arm’s length with one hand, her other arm is fully lowered and relaxed, hanging straight down by her side, she is looking directly into the camera with a soft expression and a faint, subtle smile, she wears a dark winter parka with a thick fur-lined hood framing her face, snowflakes are visible on her coat, the sky is vibrant with aurora activity and stars beginning to appear, the light is soft and cold, coming mostly from the sky glow, casting a pale greenish-blue reflection on the snow, the photo is taken in RAW with a 35mm focal length for immersive presence, evoking a sense of wonder, cold air, and cheerful adventure in a magical polar setting

A waist-up selfie-style composition taken from the woman's extended arm as she sits quietly by the window inside a vintage train carriage. The interior is richly detailed: warm wooden paneling, polished brass fixtures, and deep green velvet seats evoke a bygone era. The soft midday light filters in through a large, slightly fogged window beside her, gently illuminating her face and casting a faint, ghostlike reflection onto the glass. Outside, the blurred motion of trees and countryside begins to appear as the train slowly pulls away from the station — a subtle sense of movement captured in the background. Her posture is still, contemplative. One hand holds the camera naturally, while the other rests lightly on the windowsill. Her expression is calm but distant, eyes focused on the lens with a touch of introspection. A travel coat drapes neatly over her shoulders, and her hair is styled simply, with soft strands tucked behind one ear. The muted tones of her outfit harmonize with the nostalgic palette of the carriage. Steam and light create a gentle haze around the edges of the image, adding softness and cinematic atmosphere. The composition captures a quiet moment of departure — the tension between stillness and motion, memory and movement. Shot in cinematic RAW with a subtle grain texture and shallow depth of field, the scene evokes the aesthetic of 1950s European cinema: intimate, elegant, and quietly emotional. A portrait of solitude, transition, and time in motion.

A waist-up selfie-style composition captured in a golden wheat field at dawn. The woman holds the camera in her extended hand, framing herself against the open horizon as the first light of morning breaks behind her. Her expression is calm and grounded, eyes slightly softened by the rising glow. Her breath is faintly visible in the crisp morning air, drifting gently across the frame. Behind her, three massive hot air balloons rise slowly into the pale sky — the largest in the center, with two slightly smaller ones drifting at different depths in the background. Each balloon glows in soft gradients of amber, cream, and warm gold, catching the sunlight as they ascend in silence. The wheat around her sways slightly in the breeze, its sunlit tips flickering with motion blur, while the atmosphere is filled with delicate mist and early light. Her clothing is modest and timeless — a light jacket over a linen dress, in neutral tones that harmonize with the natural palette. Her hair lifts gently in the wind, catching the rim of sunlight from behind. The composition feels intimate and infinite all at once: a single figure in a vast space, holding the camera close, documenting a private moment of stillness and symbolic ascent. Captured in cinematic RAW from a front-facing handheld angle, the image highlights the glow of sunrise, the detailed texture of the wheat, and the graceful presence of the three balloons rising behind her — a portrait of beginnings, breath, and quiet elevation.

Waist-up shot in high-contrast late afternoon light, glowing with heat and combustion. A woman in a silver reflective jacket and dark aviator sunglasses stands still amid the chaos, captured from the exact angle of her outstretched phone’s front-facing camera — as if she is taking a selfie in real time. Her arm is extended confidently at eye level toward the lens, but the phone and hand are cropped entirely out of frame, leaving only the illusion of the viewer being inside the device. Her face is calm and composed, her expression steady behind the mirrored lenses. Behind her, a rocket bursts from the launchpad with a deafening roar, flames and thick smoke billowing upward as scaffolding and engineers blur across the launch site. The intense backlight outlines her silhouette in glowing detail, separating her stillness from the kinetic fury unfolding just beyond. It’s a surreal freeze-frame of control and spectacle — a private moment of presence in the midst of massive, historical force.

A waist-up selfie-style composition, as if captured by a front-facing phone camera during the eruptive climax of a powerful geyser. The woman stands just a few meters in front of the erupting column, her body framed tightly against the towering jet of water and steam that bursts skyward behind her. The boiling spray rises in a massive vertical plume, backlit by golden sunlight, creating a halo of sparkling droplets suspended in mid-air. Her skin glistens with mist, cheeks flushed with adrenaline, and her soaked hair clings gently to her temples. Her lips are parted in thrilled disbelief, and her eyes squint from the radiant brightness behind her. The frame pulses with raw nature — the volatile, majestic surge of water contrasts her moment of suspended stillness. Volumetric light cuts through the steam, casting rays and diffused glow across her wet features. Shot in cinematic RAW quality, with ultra-sharp textures, fast shutter freeze on water particles, and a slight fisheye lens effect to simulate a real smartphone selfie in the heat of eruption.

Waist-up shot from the phone’s front-facing camera, taken at ground level just meters from the towering, spiraling wall of an active tornado. The woman stands unnaturally still within the eerie eye of calm, surrounded by a vortex of violent motion. Her hair is violently tousled in all directions, strands clinging to her face and neck, catching light in chaotic streaks. One arm is fully extended toward the lens — cropped out of frame — while her other arm hangs loosely down. Her expression is focused, piercing, and resolutely calm, lips slightly parted, jaw tensed — eyes locking with the viewer in a surreal moment of silent defiance. Behind her, the massive tornado coils like a living column of smoke and debris, its surface textured with ribbons of brown dust, grey mist, and flashes of lightning that strobe through the dense rotation. The funnel stretches up into a roiling black sky, surrounded by clouds splitting open in layered, jagged motion. Dirt and fractured splinters of vegetation spiral around her in the midground — corn stalks, branches, a distant billboard flapping loose in the gale — all frozen in blur. Her body is lit by the charged light of the storm: the color palette flickers between muddy yellows, electric blues, and the sickly green hue of an atmosphere on edge. Raindrops strike her skin in diagonal streaks, yet she remains grounded — her shirt clinging to her torso, the fabric thin, soaked, and plastered in folds. The texture of her skin is wet and wind-chapped, goosebumps clearly visible on her arms. Her features are stunningly defined in the moment — fine cheekbones, a faint scrape across her jawline, pupils wide. Every detail in the frame — from the ridged dirt at her feet to the violent fracture of sky above — contributes to an impossible portrait of intimacy, composure, and elemental violence colliding. It’s realism at the edge of fiction — a human face inside the apocalypse.

Waist-up shot from the front-facing camera of a phone, capturing the precise moment a woman takes a selfie while floating just outside a space station, with the full curve of Earth stretching behind her in breathtaking detail. Her arm extends toward the lens, but is completely cropped from the frame; her other arm hangs relaxed beside her, suspended slightly by the lack of gravity. Her face is framed by the sleek black padding of a modern EVA helmet — visor fully retracted to reveal her serene, focused expression. She has luminous brown skin, large dark eyes reflecting the blue-white glow of the planet, and a few weightless curls escaping from her helmet liner, drifting gently in microgravity. The background bursts with cosmic clarity: Earth's atmosphere glows in a thin neon band of turquoise and violet at the horizon, while swirling cloud systems rotate slowly beneath her — continents and oceans wrapped in soft blue light. Stars pierce the dark expanse beyond, sharp and countless. Her suit is a streamlined white and graphite-grey design with subtle metallic panels, lightly illuminated by the sun’s rays. The moment is still but electric, suspended between infinite silence and planetary awe — a portrait of human presence orbiting the world below.

Waist-up composition from the point of view of a phone’s front-facing camera, capturing a woman standing on the edge of a massive Martian crater. Her selfie arm is extended at eye level, not visible in frame; the other arm rests by her side, steady inside a pressurized suit. A red dust storm builds behind her, swirling like smoke along the crater rim. The sun is faint through the haze, casting a pale orange glow over the rock and her visor. Small debris skitters across the dusty ground. Her expression remains calm and awed, suspended in silence on alien soil — a lone human gesture on another world.

Waist-up selfie view from the phone’s front camera, framed as if the viewer is the device. A woman stands at the edge of a massive ship's bow, facing the wind as waves slam the hull below. Her extended selfie arm is unseen, and the second arm drops straight down, fingertips slick with salt spray. Rain lashes sideways across her silver storm jacket, her hair pulled back by sheer force. The ocean roars behind her — towering waves rising and falling in chaotic rhythm — while lightning forks across the bruised sky. The camera captures her stillness in defiance of motio

Waist-up shot from the front-facing camera of a phone as a woman captures a selfie mid-flight in a wingsuit, gliding high above a sunlit alpine valley. The camera sees her arm reaching forward at eye level, but the hand and phone are cropped cleanly out of view. Her other arm trails naturally along her side, slightly supported by the airflow. Her flight suit stretches tight across her shoulders, and her cheeks are kissed by thin air and rushing wind. Below, deep green forests and winding rivers pass in blur, flanked by snow-capped ridges. The scene is wind-blown, weightless, and breathtaking — a moment of focused self-awareness while falling through open sky.

Waist-up selfie-style shot viewed from the phone’s front camera — the lens captures a woman standing on a narrow cliff ledge high above a turbulent sea. Her arm is extended forward to take the selfie, but the phone and hand remain out of frame. The other arm hangs straight down beside her, fingers relaxed. She wears a fitted windbreaker pressed tightly to her frame by the gusts. Behind her, crashing waves strike the rocks below, white spray rising into the air. Thunderclouds churn low overhead, lit with flashes of lightning in the far distance. Her gaze is steady, centered, as if unaffected by the chaos beyond — a moment of composed presence suspended above raw elemental power.

Waist-up shot captured from the front-facing camera of a phone held at eye level — the viewer sees through the lens as a woman takes a selfie, her extended arm cropped cleanly out of frame. She stands near the smoking rim of an active volcano, with black volcanic rock underfoot and ash drifting in the orange-red light of the setting sun. Her other arm hangs naturally down at her side. Her face is illuminated by soft, directional glow reflecting off clouds of steam. In the background, glowing magma pulses faintly within fissures, and sulfur vapor rises into the sky. Her hair is tousled by the updraft, her expression calm yet alert — a surreal moment of stillness on the brink of eruption.

Waist-up shot in warm golden hour light over dry savanna grass and distant acacia trees. A woman stands calmly atop a low ridge, captured precisely from the perspective of her phone’s front-facing camera as she takes a selfie — her arm is extended directly toward the lens at eye level, but both the phone and her hand are carefully excluded from the frame. The composition creates the immersive illusion that the viewer is looking through the phone she holds. Her expression is serene and grounded, eyes gently focused on the screen. She wears a soft linen wrap in muted earth tones that catch the sunlight with a natural glow, and the warm light brushes across her cheekbones and collarbone. Behind her, the vast savanna stretches into the horizon, where a lone lion stands silhouetted in the deep orange light, his profile proud and unmoving. A swirl of dust lifts into the air, and birds scatter against the sky. The frame captures the quiet juxtaposition of human self-awareness and untamed majesty — a modern moment of digital presence nestled inside the eternal stillness of the wild.

data.title: Eastern Voyage
data.description: Photos with the spirit of the magical East

templates.promptTemplate:
Fashion portrait of a woman wearing traditional Muslim women’s attire, shown from the chest up.
She is dressed in an elaborate ceremonial hijab ensemble that completely covers her hair and neck, layered with regal white fabric and richly adorned accessories. Over the hijab, she wears a sculptural headpiece made of deep red velvet, embroidered with gold thread and embellished with pearl strands, gemstone clusters, and a central jeweled crest. Her gown is cut from the same velvet, heavily decorated with gold embroidery across the padded shoulders, high collar, and flared sleeves. The silhouette is stately and structured, combining elements of bridal and royal Islamic heritage.

Her expression is serene, eyes turned slightly to the side, captured frontally in gentle light. The framing is close, from the chest up, focusing on the ornate layering of the headpiece and embroidery.

Setting: she stands beneath a carved stone archway that opens onto an elevated terrace, with a distant landscape of minarets, tiled roofs, and warm twilight sky. Architectural patterns frame her on both sides, while soft orange light floods the scene. The background is subtly out of focus to keep attention on her attire.

Lighting: soft golden-hour light from the side, with even frontal fill. Highlights glimmer across velvet and gold detailing, while shadows bring out depth in folds and texture.
Camera: 85mm lens, portrait orientation, close-up composition with a slight side angle.
Style: editorial fashion portrait celebrating ceremonial Islamic dress, interpreted with bridal richness and historical symbolism.

Negative prompt: sunglasses, theatrical fantasy, nun costume, exposed hair, casual scarf, Western headwear, modern styles, minimalist garments.

She walks directly toward the camera with quiet poise and focus, her expression calm behind sculptural black sunglasses.
